testcase.name: test_roadmap_snapshots_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_items_13_19.py:43: in test_roadmap_snapshots_endpoint assert r.status_code == 200, f"Snapshots: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Snapshots: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_roadmap_projects_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_items_13_19.py:50: in test_roadmap_projects_endpoint assert r.status_code == 200, f"Projects: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Projects: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_export_unauthenticated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_items_13_19.py:81: in test_export_unauthenticated assert r.status_code == 401 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_connectors_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_items_13_19.py:158: in test_connectors_endpoint assert r.status_code == 200, f"Connectors: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: Connectors: 404 {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sap_connector_rfc_option
